title: Mak, Alan - Parliamentary Under Secretary of State for Economic Security - ACOBA advice
body: "Alan Mak MP left his role at the Cabinet Office in July 2024.  Partner, Spex Captial Limited  Mr Mak sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Spex Capital Limited. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in September 2025 and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
